narrative:
Timothy Castagne is a right-back representing Belgium at the FIFA World Cup 2026. His overall rating stands at 7.15/10, placing him in the top 4% of right-backs at this tournament. This rating is primarily driven by 74% from his club form over the last two seasons. He has played 388 minutes in this World Cup.

Castagne demonstrates strong defensive metrics, averaging 2.784 tackles and 1.856 interceptions per 90 minutes at this World Cup. His offensive contributions are evident in 1.624 key passes and 0.159 expected assists per 90 minutes. However, with just 0.032 expected goals and 0.696 shots per 90 minutes, his direct goal threat remains low.

Castagne functions as a reliable right-back for Belgium, offering defensive solidity and significant contribution to build-up play. His high volume of key passes and expected assists suggests he is a key creator from wide areas. Scouts should continue to monitor his consistent defensive work and ability to provide attacking width without being a primary goal scorer.
